Student Counselor : Global Express Education Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Global Express Education Student Counselor Application Deadline : 12 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 2 Age: 21 to 35 years Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 02 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 21 to 35 years Only Female Responsibilities & Context Looking for a smart, focused, and preferably experienced Student Counselor who will conduct proper counseling to the students with appropriate information and guidance during the whole process of higher education abroad. Responsibilities: Provide telephonic counseling to the leads of all resources & invite them to walk into the office for counseling. Respective candidate must know about any of the destinations(UK/Australia/Canada/USA/Sweden/Netherlands/Denmark/EU) Admission, Study Visa Requirements & Visa Application Process Presenting info on social media through photo/video shoots or FB live. Connectivity with clients through social media & convincing through telemarketing. Ready to go the extra mile to assist students. Meet foreign university delegates. Representing the company during fairs and events. Completing tasks assigned by management. Skills & Expertise Europe Visa Processing Foreign Study Consultancy Knowledge of overseas study Student Assessment Student Consultancy Study Australia UK counselling Suggested by Education Counseling Student Counseling Compensation & Other Benefits T/A,Mobile bill,Performance bonus,Profit share Salary Review: Half Yearly Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only females are allowed to apply. Job Location Dhaka Company Information Global Express Education Follow Address: Dhaka: 20/4, 2nd Floor, Beside Square Hospital, West Panthapath, Dhaka
Sylhet: Manru Shopping City, 4th Floor (Lift-3), Chowhatta, Sylhet Website: https://globalexpressedu.com Business: Global Express Education is an education consultancy providing professional guidance for international study. We support students with counseling, university admissions, visa applications, and pre-departure services, helping them confidently pursue higher education opportunities worldwide. Report this Job / Company (রিপোর্ট) রিপোর্ট এই চাকরির জন্য বিজ্ঞাপনদাতা ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠান আপনার কাছ থেকে কোন অর্থ চাইলে কিংবা নিয়োগ প্রক্রিয়া চলাকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানিমূলক (শারীরিক/মানসিক) আচরণ করলে অতিসত্ত্বর আমাদেরকে জানান অথবা জবটি রিপোর্ট করুন। চাকরি পাওয়ার জন্য কোন ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠানকে অর্থ প্রদান করবেন না। চাকরিকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানির (শারীরিক/মানসিক) সম্ভাবনা থাকলে সেখানে জয়েন করবেন না। কোন প্রকার অর্থ লেনদেন বা নিয়োগদাতা কর্তৃক হয়রানির দায়িত্ব বিডিজবস বহন করবে না। 09638666444 , 01897627858 complain@bdj

Lead Generation & Digital Marketing Expert : GenZ Marketing Agency Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List GenZ Marketing Agency Lead Generation & Digital Marketing Expert Application Deadline : 13 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Location: Dhaka (Uttara) Salary: Negotiable Experience: 2 to 5 years Published: 03 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Diploma Bachelor/Honors Masters Experience 2 to 5 years The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): Direct Selling/Marketing Service Company, IT Enabled Service Responsibilities & Context About us: Time Research & Innovation Ltd. (Timerni) is a global research and technology company operating in Bangladesh and the UK. We combine innovation, data, and digital strategy to help businesses grow smarter and faster in the era of the Fifth Industrial Revolution. Our projects span software development, AI-driven solutions, digital marketing, and data analytics, helping clients achieve measurable growth. Role Overview: We’re looking for a dynamic professional who can handle both Lead Generation and Digital Marketing. You’ll be responsible for generating high-quality leads, running digital campaigns, and optimizing performance across multiple channels to drive business growth. This is not a partial role — we need someone who can manage end-to-end online marketing and lead generation. Key Responsibilities Lead Generation Research and identify potential leads via LinkedIn, email, social media, and other platforms . Build and maintain high-quality prospect lists . Execute outreach campaigns, follow-ups, and nurturing sequences. Qualify leads based on interest, budget, and readiness to buy . Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to maximize lead conversion. Track lead performance and continuously optimize strategies. Digital Marketing Plan and execute Google Ads, Meta Ads, social media, and email campaigns . Optimize campaigns for conversions, engagement, and ROI . Manage content strategy, social media presence, and brand promotion . Analyse campaign performance with Google Analytics, GA4, Meta Insights , etc. Collaborate with SEO specialists for organic reach and traffic. Innovate and test new marketing strategies, channels, and tools. Combined Role Integrate lead generation and digital marketing strategies for maximum impact. Drive end-to-end results from awareness to lead capture to conversion. Provide actionable insights and reports to improve campaigns continuously. Skills & Expertise Digital Marketing lead generation Suggested by Digital Marketing (Social Media Marketing) Search Engine Optimization (SEO) Social Media Management Compensation & Other Benefits Weekly 2 holidays,Over time allowance Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka

Sales & Client Success Manager : LynOrg Technologies Limited Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List LynOrg Technologies Limited Sales & Client Success Manager Application Deadline : 13 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 02 Age: 22 to 40 years Location: Dhaka Salary: Tk. 25000 - 45000 (Monthly) Published: 04 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 22 to 40 years 2 to 5 years of experience. Experience in B2B Sales , Corporate Sales , or Software/SaaS Sales is highly preferred. Candidates who understand ERP or Business Automation tools will have a distinct advantage. Responsibilities & Context Product: Garlic ERP Job Location: Banani, Dhaka About Us: Lynorg Technologies Limited is a premier software company dedicated to eliminating inefficiencies in global enterprises. Our core solution, Garlic ERP , provides management with total control and real-time visibility, eliminating the hidden costs of manual inefficiency. Designed for the "Lean Organization," Garlic ERP integrates powerful modules including Lyn-HRM (Human Resource Management), Lyn-Pay (Invoice and Payment Solution), Lyn-Flow (Workflow Automation Platform), Lyn-Lease (Lease Management), and Lyn-Docs (Document Management), Lyn-EPM (Enterprise Performance Management) etc. to empower businesses with speed, control, and real-time visibility. We are looking for energetic individuals to join our mission of transforming businesses into digital powerhouses. Job Context: We are hiring Sales & Client Success Manager to represent Garlic ERP to corporate clients. In this role, you will be the face of our brand, consulting businesses to digitize their operations using our ERP suite. You will own the entire client journey - from the initial pitch of Garlic ERP to closing the deal and ensuring successful client onboarding. Key Responsibilities: Business Development (Sales): Identify and approach corporate clients (B2B) to present the Garlic ERP solution stack. Conduct product demonstrations, highlighting how Garlic ERP eliminates waste and automates manual processes. Negotiate contracts and close deals to achieve monthly sales targets. Client Success (CS): Act as the dedicated account manager for your clients, ensuring they fully utilize the software. Address client queries and coordinate with the technical team for smooth implementation. Build long-term relationships to drive renewals and cross-sell additional Garlic ERP modules. Administrative: Maintain accurate records of sales pipelines, client feedback, and reports. Skills & Expertise Suggested by Client Relationship Management Customer satisfaction Sales & Marketing Sales Target Achievement Compensation & Other Benefits Weekly 2 holidays Festival Bonus: 2 Salary Review: Yearly C

Job Duties: Visit local clients and offices if needed Explain our software products Bring new customers Maintain good relationship with clients Achieve monthly sales target Office Time: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Holiday: Friday & Alternative Saturday Joining: After Eid-ul-Fitr Skills & Expertise Communication Microsoft PowerPoint MS Excel MS Word Sales & Marketing Suggested by Software Sales Marketing Target Oriented Compensation & Other Benefits Lunch Facilities: Full Subsidize Festival Bonus: 2 Sales Commission Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka Company Information SOLVERS Follow More jobs from this company Address: House#70,Road#2,Block#A,Nikaton,Gulshan-1,Dhaka Business: Software Development Report this Job / Company (রিপোর্ট) রিপোর্ট এই চাকরির জন্য বিজ্ঞাপনদাতা ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠান আপনার কাছ থেকে কোন অর্থ চাইলে কিংবা নিয়োগ প্রক্রিয়া চলাকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানিমূলক (শারীরিক/মানসিক) আচরণ করলে অতিসত্ত্বর আমাদেরকে জানান অথবা জবটি রিপোর্ট করুন। চাকরি পাওয়ার জন্য কোন ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠানকে অর্থ প্রদান করবেন না। চাকরিকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানির (শারীরিক/মানসিক) সম্ভাবনা থাকলে সেখানে জয়েন করবেন না। কোন প্রকার অর্থ লেনদেন বা নিয়োগদাতা কর্তৃক হয়রানির দায়িত্ব বিডিজবস বহন করবে না। 09638666444 , 01897627858 complain@bdjobs.com ⏸ Internal Auditor certificate course on ISO 9001:2015 4000 BDT Joyshree Das Register Now Project Cycle Management (PCM) for the NGO Professionals 4500 BDT Tareq Ahmed Register Now Lean Six Sigma-Yellow Belt 3500 BDT Engr. ড্রাইভার (পিকআপ) : HIGH-TEX (Zinzira) Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List HIGH-TEX (Zinzira) ড্রাইভার (পিকআপ) Application Deadline : 17 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Company Information Summary Vacancy: 3 Age: At least 20 years Location: Dhaka (Keraniganj) Salary: Negotiable Published: 07 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age At least 20 years Only Male প্রার্থীকে অবশ্যই নামাজী হতে হবে। প্রার্থীকে অবশ্যই নেশা মুক্ত হতে হবে। ভাল আচরণ বজায় রাখা এবং সকল কর্মীদের প্রতি যথাযথ সম্মান প্রদর্শন করা কার্যক্ষেত্রে সততা এবং দক্ষতা বজায় রাখা। Responsibilities & Context গাড়ীর সার্ভিসিং, কাগজের আপডেট এবং গাড়ীর প্রযুক্তিগত সমস্যা সম্পর্কে অবগত থাকা। গাড়ীতে মালামাল উঠা নামা করতে সাহায্য করা। দূরবর্তী গন্তব্যে রওনা হওয়ার আগে অবশ্যই গাড়ির ইঞ্জিন, তেল, মবিল, চাকা পর্যবেক্ষণ করে যাত্রা শুরু করা। নিয়মিত গাড়ী পরিষ্কার পরিচ্ছন্ন রাখা ও রক্ষণাবেক্ষণ করা। সুনির্দিষ্ট সময়ের মধ্যে নির্দেশিত দায়িত্ব সম্পন্ন করা । ব্যবস্থাপনা কর্তৃপক্ষের প্রয়োজনে যেকোন সময় দায়িত্ব পালন করা। অফিস প্রদত্ত নিয়মাবলী মেনে এবং ট্রাফিক নিয়মানুসারে নিরাপদ ড্রাইভিং সেবা প্রদান করা। Skills & Expertise Driving Skills Heavy Driver Suggested by Driving Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Admission & Visa Executive - USA, Canada : KOMPASS Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List KOMPASS Admission & Visa Executive - USA, Canada Application Deadline : 15 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 5 Age: 20 to 35 years Location: Dhaka (Ramna, Siddheswari... Dhaka (Ramna, Siddheswari) Salary: Negotiable Published: 07 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 20 to 35 years Punctuality: Arrive on time and adhere to work schedules. Sincerity: Approach all tasks with sincerity and a commitment to student success. Responsibilities & Context Overview: Join Kompass Education Consultancy as an Admission and Visa Executive and play a crucial role in helping students navigate the admissions and visa processes for the USA and/or Canada. We’re looking for candidates who are detail-oriented, passionate about education, and dedicated to student success. Responsibilities: University Applications: Assist students in applying to universities in the USA and Canada. Visa Applications: Guide students through the visa application processes for their chosen countries. Student Support: Maintain a helpful mentality towards students, providing support and answering their queries Skills & Expertise Client Service Communication Education and Training Education Counseling Education Research Visa Processing Suggested by Student Counseling Student Visa Processing Compensation & Other Benefits Competitive salary. Opportunities for career growth. Employees with at least 2 years of service may be eligible for an L1A visa opportunity. What We Offer: A supportive and collaborative work environment. Opportunities for professional growth and development. A chance to make a meaningful impact on students` educational journeys. Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka (Ramna, Siddheswari) Company Information KOMPASS Follow Address: 56,Baily Road,Ramna- Dhaka 1217 Business: Kompass is a committed and trusted education and visa consultancy firm in Dhaka Bangladesh. Application Insights View Requirements Education SSC (Vocational) Additional Requirements Age 18 to 45 years Responsibilities & Context কারখানার সকল প্রকার সম্পদ ও মালামালের রক্ষনাবেক্ষণ সহ তদারকি করা। কোন প্রকার সমস্যা পরিলক্ষিত হলে তাৎক্ষণিক ঊর্ধ্বতন কর্মকর্তাকে অবহিত করা। কারখানার আগত মালামাল এবং বের হওয়া মালামালের সঠিক পরিমান যাচাই করা এবং যথাযথ নথিভুক্ত করা। কর্মি ভিজিটর ও অন্যান্য প্রার্থীদের অফিস আসা ও যাওয়া পর্যবেক্ষণ এবং অনুমতি প্রদান বিষয়ে দায়িত্ব পালন ও নিয়ন্ত্রণ করা। সার্বক্ষণিক কারখানার অভ্যন্তরে ও বাহিরের নিরাপত্তা নিশ্চিত করা। ইকুইপমেন্ট ও প্রপার্টি ড্যামেজ, চুরি, অপরাধী ব্যক্তি প্রবেশ, অপ্রত্যাশিত ঘটনা পর্যবেক্ষণ করা রিপোর্ট করা। কারখানায় রুটিন মাফিক সার্বক্ষণিক টহল এর দায়িত্ব পালন করা। যথাযথ লকিং সিস্টেম বজায় রাখা এবং কারখানা প্রাঙ্গনের নিরাপত্তা নিশ্চিত করা। ম্যানেজমেন্ট কর্তৃক নির্ধারিত অন্য যে কোন দায়িত্ব পালন করা। Skills & Expertise Suggested by Security Guard Security Security Management Compensation & Other Benefits Insurance Festival Bonus: 2 চাকুরীর সুযোগ-সুবিধা গুলো হল: @ থাকার সুবিধা আছে। @ নিজ খরচে মেসে খাওয়ার ব্যবস্থা আছে। @ বাৎসরিক ইনক্রিমেন্ট। @ চাকুরীর মেয়াদ ছয় মাস হবার পর দুটি ঈদ বোনাস। @ গ্রুপ ইন্সুরেন্স কাভারেজ। @ কর্মদক্ষতার ভিত্তিতে পদোন্নতি। @ কোন প্রকার ঘুষ বা অগ্রিম জামানতের প্রয়োজন নাই। Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Narayanganj Company Information Baolee Overseas Ltd. job_title: Student Counsellor - University Admission And Visa Process
job_description:
Student Counsellor - University Admission And Visa Process : Hanzala Global Education Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Hanzala Global Education Student Counsellor - University Admission And Visa Process Application Deadline : 13 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Company Information Summary Vacancy: 2 Age: 25 to 35 years Location: Dhaka (Purana Paltan) Salary: Negotiable Published: 03 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 25 to 35 years Responsibilities & Context Counseling students. Assess student’s academic background,budget and career goal. Suggest suitable countries,universities and programs. Provide information about study options ( Schengen countries). Explain entry requirements. Apply in Universities. Skills & Expertise Application in different University Portal Documentation university application process Suggested by Immigration Consultancy Student Consultancy Student Counseling visa file processing. Level 15, Office Type A/1
New 218 Shahid Nazrul Islam Sarani, Old 45 Topkhana Road

Assistant Engineer (Civil) : Design cell Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Design cell Assistant Engineer (Civil) Application Deadline : 20 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: 25 to 32 years Location: Dhaka (Rampura) Salary: Negotiable Published: 11 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 25 to 32 years Only Male Good Communication skills Strong leadership qualities, analytical mindset for feasibility studies, and the ability to work under pressure to meet project deadlines. Responsibilities & Context Estimation of Civil Work, Interior Work & Site Supervision. Ensure quality of construction & Interior work as per approved drawing. Preparing Material requirements schedule and submission to management for timely procurement. Check the subcontractor bills. Assess the quality of input construction material and monitor proper use of those. Ensuring all materials used and work performed are as per specifications. Assist in preparing project estimates and Bills of Quantities (BOQ). Prepare project progress reports and maintain coordination with the team. Prepare drawings, working drawings, and presentations using AutoCAD Skills & Expertise AutoCAD 2D 3D MS Excel Suggested by Civil Civil Engineering Interior Design Compensation & Other Benefits T/A,Mobile bill,Performance bonus Salary Review: Yearly Festival Bonus: 1 Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply.
